history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A game match summary screen shows a “Bermuda” results view with team outcomes, kill statistics, and a highlighted match list.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a user interface panel showing match results for multiple players. In the center, there is a vertical list of match entries with status labels like “MENANG” and “KALAH,” along with timestamps and small icons. On the right, a results column shows “BOOYAH!” at the top with a row of small character/medal-like icons and a set of numeric statistics such as KILL, DAMAGE, MEMBANGUNKAN, and HEADSHOT, plus a “DETAIL” button at the bottom.

Setting:
This appears to be an in-game menu overlay with a dark, purple-toned background and a blurred, dim scene behind the UI. The time of day and weather are not clear, as the background is not detailed.

Visual Details:
The interface uses dark gray and black panels with gold and yellow accents. The central list includes highlighted entries with gold borders, and each entry contains text in white and yellow, plus small icons on the left and a small clipboard/paper-like icon near the right side of each row. The top bar contains multiple small icons and numbers in gold/white, and the overall layout is arranged in columns: a left sidebar, a central match list, and a right statistics panel. Lighting is mostly UI-style, with neon purple and gold highlights against the dark background.

Visible Text:

Practical Summary:
The image shows a competitive game results screen with a highlighted match history list in the center. It also displays “BOOYAH!” and a set of performance stats on the right, including kill and damage totals and player entries.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
